name: Valentine’s Series!- Keigo Takami
description:
HI MY BABY BIRDS! Today we have our favorite little chicken wing, ✨Keigo✨ and I think this is gonna be a good one! Hopefully.

I’ve done Aizawa, Bakugo, Shinso, Shoto, Present Mic, Denki, and Monoma! Check those out if you haven’t already.

Shoutout to HeartxArrow for suggesting Keigo this time! Here’s a cookie 🍪

Scenario’s:

1. FemPOV, 4. MalePOV: you almost got hurt by a villain, Keigo lectures you but accidentally admits he loves you ❤️

2. FemPOV, 5. MalePOV: you’re Keigo’s girlfriend/boyfriend and he tries to make you valentines dinner but he sucks at cooking

3. FemPOV, 6. MalePOV: you’re Keigo’s assistant and he’s always been flirty, as always, but he actually has feelings for you and asks you to be his valentine!

Let me know who I should do next! I’m NOT doing All Might, Endeavor, nor Mineta, but the others are fine!

Remember, you all are loved, amazing, and absolutely beautiful! Mwah~! Love y’all!
creator: AsherDaFloof
